notes: Un-baked height and light from build_floor/build_ceiling/build_media_surface. position.y now carries a surface discriminator (SURFACE_FLOOR=0.0, SURFACE_CEILING=1.0, SURFACE_MEDIA=2.0) for the shader (box 3.1) to pick the per-polygon height; light set to UNBAKED_LIGHT=1.0 sentinel for box 3.2. Walls intentionally left baked (span two polygons' heights; outside this box's scope). Tests: floor_height_no_longer_baked_into_vertex_y (two polys, different floor_height -> identical Y, differ only by polygon_index), floor_ceiling_media_light_is_unbaked_sentinel. 28 lib + 8 integration tests pass; wasm32 cargo check green.
